guion_padre.introduccion: Welcome to Lesson 5. Today we will explore some wonderful sounds.
guion_padre.instruccion_i: Point to the big I and say: iiiiii. Keep the sound going!
guion_padre.instruccion_d: Now point to the big D and say: dddddd.

parent_story: Tim the duck saw a pink pin in the mud. Dig, dig! Tim took the pin to his nest.
